---
title: "Analysis Notebook"
description: "Analysis notebook for synthesis chapter Ōkaro and deep stone piles Rotoiti"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
fig-width: 8
fig-height: 6

execute:
  freeze: false
  cache: false

---


# Setup
```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

packages <- c("readr", "readxl", "tidyverse", "dplyr", "ggplot2")

# Load packages if not already installed
quiet_load <- function(pkg) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressWarnings(suppressMessages(install.packages(pkg, dependencies = TRUE)))}
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(require(pkg, character.only = TRUE, quietly = TRUE))
  invisible(TRUE)}

options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))
invisible(lapply(packages, quiet_load))

setwd("06_synthesis/")

exc_file_dir <- "data/raw"
der_data_dir <- "data/derived"
out_dir      <- "outputs"

# Read sheets from raw xlsx
df_okaro_raw    <- readxl::read_excel(exc_file_dir, okaro_raw_data.xlsx, sheet = "Monitoring_data")
df_deep_raw     <- readxl::read_excel(exc_file_dir, deep_stonepiles_raw_data.xlsx, sheet = "Deep_vid")
#HOBO_data_okaro <- readxl::read_excel(exc_file_dir, okaro_raw_data.xlsx, sheet = "HOBO_data")
#HOBO_data_deep  <- readxl::read_excel(exc_file_dir, deep_stonepiles_raw_data.xlsx, sheet = "HOBO_data")

# Load the okaro HOBO Data 
DO_Logger_14_stone_pile_1_291024 <- read_csv("Data_raw/HOBO_Loggers_okaro/DO_Logger_14_reef_122_291024.csv", skip = 1)
DO_Logger_14_stone_pile_1_131224 <- read_csv("Data_raw/HOBO_Loggers_okaro/DO_Logger_14_reef_122_131224.csv", skip = 1)
DO_Logger_14_stone_pile_1_090225 <- read_csv("Data_raw/HOBO_Loggers_okaro/DO_Logger_14_reef_122_090225.csv", skip = 1)

DO_Logger_11_stone_pile_2_291024 <- read_csv("Data_raw/HOBO_Loggers_okaro/DO_Logger_11_reef_123_291024.csv", skip = 1)
DO_Logger_11_stone_pile_2_131224 <- read_csv("Data_raw/HOBO_Loggers_okaro/DO_Logger_11_reef_123_131224.csv", skip = 1)
DO_Logger_11_stone_pile_2_280225 <- read_csv("Data_raw/HOBO_Loggers_okaro/DO_Logger_11_reef_123_280225.csv", skip = 1)

DO_Logger_3_control_3_291024 <- read_csv("Data_raw/HOBO_Loggers_okaro/DO_Logger_3_control_124_291024.csv", skip = 1)
DO_Logger_3_control_3_131224 <- read_csv("Data_raw/HOBO_Loggers_okaro/DO_Logger_3_control_124_131224.csv", skip = 1)
DO_Logger_3_control_3_280225 <- read_csv("Data_raw/HOBO_Loggers_okaro/DO_Logger_3_control_124_280225.csv", skip = 1)

# Combine and Rename the columns -----------------------------------------------------------
DO_Logger_14_stone_pile_1_291024 <- DO_Logger_14_stone_pile_1_291024 %>% select(ID = 1,DateTime = 2,DO_mg_L = 3,Temp_C = 4) %>%
  mutate(DateTime = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format = "%m/%d/%y %I:%M:%S %p", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"),Site = "122 Stone pile", )
DO_Logger_14_stone_pile_1_131224 <- DO_Logger_14_stone_pile_1_131224 %>% select(ID = 1,DateTime = 2,DO_mg_L = 3,Temp_C = 4) %>%
  mutate(DateTime = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format = "%m/%d/%y %I:%M:%S %p", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"),Site = "122 Stone pile")
DO_Logger_14_stone_pile_1_090225 <- DO_Logger_14_stone_pile_1_090225 %>% select(ID = 1,DateTime = 2,DO_mg_L = 3,Temp_C = 4) %>%
  mutate(DateTime = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format = "%m/%d/%y %I:%M:%S %p", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"),Site = "122 Stone pile")
Site_1 <- bind_rows(DO_Logger_14_stone_pile_1_291024, DO_Logger_14_stone_pile_1_131224,DO_Logger_14_stone_pile_1_090225)
# filter after 09/02/25
Site_1 <- Site_1 %>% filter(DateTime < "2025-02-09 00:00:00")

DO_Logger_11_stone_pile_2_291024 <- DO_Logger_11_stone_pile_2_291024 %>% select(ID = 1,DateTime = 2,DO_mg_L = 3,Temp_C = 4) %>%
  mutate(DateTime = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format = "%m/%d/%y %I:%M:%S %p", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"),Site = "123 Stone pile")
DO_Logger_11_stone_pile_2_131224 <- DO_Logger_11_stone_pile_2_131224 %>% select(ID = 1,DateTime = 2,DO_mg_L = 3,Temp_C = 4) %>%
  mutate(DateTime = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format = "%m/%d/%y %I:%M:%S %p", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"),Site = "123 Stone pile")
DO_Logger_11_stone_pile_2_280225 <- DO_Logger_11_stone_pile_2_280225 %>% select(ID = 1,DateTime = 2,DO_mg_L = 3,Temp_C = 4) %>%
  mutate(DateTime = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format = "%m/%d/%y %I:%M:%S %p", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"),Site = "123 Stone pile")
Site_2 <- bind_rows(DO_Logger_11_stone_pile_2_291024, DO_Logger_11_stone_pile_2_131224, DO_Logger_11_stone_pile_2_280225)
# filter after 28/02/25
Site_2 <- Site_2 %>% filter(DateTime < "2025-02-28 00:00:00")

DO_Logger_3_control_3_291024 <- DO_Logger_3_control_3_291024 %>% select(ID = 1,DateTime = 2,DO_mg_L = 3,Temp_C = 4) %>%
  mutate(DateTime = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format = "%m/%d/%y %I:%M:%S %p", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"),Site = "124 Control")
DO_Logger_3_control_3_131224 <- DO_Logger_3_control_3_131224 %>% select(ID = 1,DateTime = 2,DO_mg_L = 3,Temp_C = 4) %>%
  mutate(DateTime = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format = "%m/%d/%y %I:%M:%S %p", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"),Site = "124 Control")
DO_Logger_3_control_3_280225 <- DO_Logger_3_control_3_280225 %>% select(ID = 1,DateTime = 2,DO_mg_L = 3,Temp_C = 4) %>%
  mutate(DateTime = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format = "%m/%d/%y %I:%M:%S %p", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"),Site = "124 Control")
Site_3 <- bind_rows(DO_Logger_3_control_3_291024,DO_Logger_3_control_3_131224, DO_Logger_3_control_3_280225)
# filter after 28/02/25
Site_3 <- Site_3 %>% filter(DateTime < "2025-02-28 00:00:00")

Okaro_do_data <- bind_rows(Site_1, Site_2, Site_3)

# Deep
DO_Logger_2_deep <- read_csv("Data_raw/HOBO_Loggers_deep/DO_Logger_2_Deep.csv", skip = 1)
DO_Logger_3_deep <- read_csv("Data_raw/HOBO_Loggers_deep/DO_Logger_3_Deep.csv", skip = 1)

DO_Logger_2_deep <- DO_Logger_2_deep %>% select(ID = 1,DateTime = 2,DO_mg_L = 3,Temp_C = 4) %>%
  mutate(DateTime = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format = "%m/%d/%y %I:%M:%S %p", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"), Logger = "2")
DO_Logger_3_deep <- DO_Logger_3_deep %>% select(ID = 1,DateTime = 2,DO_mg_L = 3,Temp_C = 4) %>%
  mutate(DateTime = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format = "%m/%d/%y %I:%M:%S %p", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"), Logger = "3")

Deep_do_data <- bind_rows(DO_Logger_2_deep, DO_Logger_3_deep)







# Save as csv to derived/
write.csv(df_okaro_raw,file.path(der_data_dir, "Okaro_data.csv"),  row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(df_deep_raw, file.path(der_data_dir, "Deep_data.csv"),  row.names = FALSE)

df_okaro_raw <- read.csv(file.path(der_data_dir, "Okaro_data.csv"))
df_deep_raw <- read.csv(file.path(der_data_dir, "Deep_data.csv"))

# Set base for plots
base_theme_bw <- theme_classic() +
  theme(text     = element_text(family = "sans", size = 11),
    axis.title   = element_text(face = "plain"),
    axis.text    = element_text(face = "plain"),
    plot.title   = element_text(face = "plain"),
    strip.text   = element_text(face = "plain"),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.3))
theme_set(base_theme_bw)

# Format of p values in text, including the correct comparison operator and
# the italic "p" label. Set label = FALSE for values chained after a leading
# "*p*" (e.g. "*p* < 0.001, 0.011, 0.004, respectively").
format_pval <- function(p, label = TRUE) {
  out <- if (p < 0.001) "< 0.001" else paste0("= ", format(round(p, 3), nsmall = 3))
  if (label) paste0("*p* ", out) else out
}







```
